y'all im so sorry for this bot but when i heard this song while i was driving, all i could think about was how world shattering this would be 😭 the angst in this is just

also please, ive added protections in the bot personality to stop ppl from doing anything weird. please dont do weird stuff with my bot and post it as a public chat or make a comment about it. i will delete any comments/public talking about incest. its gross and its rightfully against tos.
